Evaluator.description:
A person who evaluates a thesis (supervisor or opponent).

``v0`` — loose. ``id`` and ``role`` are optional because raw sources may not
expose a stable identifier, and an ``Evaluator`` may be referenced outside the
context of a single role (e.g. in aggregated stats).

name.description: Full display name of the evaluator.
name.title: Name

id.description: Stable identifier for the evaluator, if known. Scheme TBD.
id.title: Id

image_url.description: Profile image reference (site-relative path or absolute URL), if any.
image_url.title: Image Url

role.description: Role for the referencing thesis, if applicable.

Evaluator.title: Evaluator

EvaluatorRole.description: Role an evaluator plays for a given thesis.
EvaluatorRole.title: EvaluatorRole

description:
A normalised thesis record produced by the parser.

``v0`` — the core fields the web app needs for the supervisor + opponent lookup,
plus light metadata. Some fields are optional because not every source record
will expose them.

id.description: Stable id for the thesis (carried from RawThesis).
id.title: Id

language.description: Language of the thesis (e.g. 'cs', 'en'). Optional for v0.
language.title: Language

defense_grade.description: Overall defense grade on the provisional 1-4 scale (1 = best).
defense_grade.title: Defense Grade

title: ParsedThesis
